item.dc:creator: Monica Alba
Alexandra Marquez
item.description: President Donald Trump on Friday sent letters to Congress explaining that, due to the ceasefire, he doesn't need its authorization for military operations in Iran, even though the conflict hit the 60-day mark this week."On April 7, 2026, I ordered a two-week ceasefire.

media:content.media:text: President Trump Signs Executive Order Expanding Retirement Accounts In The Oval Office
media:content.media:description: President Donald Trump speaks during an executive order signing in the Oval Office of the White House on April 30, 2026 in Washington, D.C. President Trump signed multiple executive orders including one to expand retirement account access for workers.

item.title: Trump says he doesn't need congressional authorization for Iran war, citing ceasefire

item.dc:creator: Gordon Lubold
Courtney Kube
Dan De Luce
Monica Alba
item.description: Iran is taking advantage of the ceasefire with the U.S. to dig out its weapons, according to a U.S. official and two other people familiar with the matter.

media:content.media:text: Iranian missile falls near Qamishli International Airport
media:content.media:description: People stand next to an unexploded Iranian missile on March 4 in Qamishli, Syria.

media:content.media:text: Image: A missile launched from Iran in the sky, viewed from the Bureij camp for Palestinian refugees in the central Gaza Strip
media:content.media:description: People stand next to an unexploded Iranian missile on March 4 in Qamishli, Syria.

item.title: Iran is accelerating efforts to dig out missiles and munitions

item.dc:creator: Steve Kopack
item.description: The national average gas price rose to $4.39 per gallon, in its biggest one-day jump since a ceasefire with Iran was announced on April 7.

media:content.media:text: Image: Vehicles sit parked at fuel pumps as regular gasoline prices above $6 per gallon and diesel prices above $7 per gallon are displayed outside a Mobil gas station
media:content.media:description: Vehicles sit parked at fuel pumps as regular gasoline prices above $6 per gallon and diesel prices above $7 per gallon are displayed outside a Mobil gas station in Redondo Beach, California on April 30, 2026. Energy costs have surged since the near-total closure of the Strait of Hormuz, through which about a fifth of the world's oil and gas usually passes, following the outbreak of the US-Israeli war against Iran.

item.title: Gas prices hit $4.39 per gallon in biggest one-day jump since Iran ceasefire announced

item.dc:creator: Allan Smith
item.description: Conspiracy theories have been central to Donald Trump’s political rise.

media:content.media:text: A photo illustration of Donald Trump, looking concerned, against a monochrome spiral pattern.

item.title: Trump has lost control of the conspiracy theories

item.description: The Justice Department released chilling new surveillance video of the man charged with trying to assassinate President Donald Trump at the White House Correspondents’ Dinner. Prosecutors say it shows Cole Allen casing the Washington Hilton the day before the attack. New evidence photos also show bags of ammunition inside his room as well as a gas mask and protective glasses. NBC’s Gabe Gutierrez reports for TODAY.

media:content.media:title: DOJ Releases New Video of Assassination Suspect 'Casing' Hotel
media:content.media:description: The Justice Department released chilling new surveillance video of the man charged with trying to assassinate President Donald Trump at the White House Correspondents’ Dinner. Prosecutors say it shows Cole Allen casing the Washington Hilton the day before the attack. New evidence photos also show bags of ammunition inside his room as well as a gas mask and protective glasses. NBC’s Gabe Gutierrez reports for TODAY.

item.title: DOJ Releases New Video of Assassination Suspect 'Casing' Hotel

item.dc:creator: Alexandra Marquez
item.description: Former President Joe Biden on Friday backed former Atlanta mayor Keisha Lance Bottoms' campaign for governor in Georgia, his first endorsement since leaving office last year."I've known her for a long time, and she's something special," Biden said in a video backing the former mayor, who served as a senior adviser in the Biden administration

media:content.media:text: A split composite of Joe Biden and Keisha Lance Bottoms.
media:content.media:description: Former President Joe Biden said Keisha Lance Bottoms is "ready" to be governor of Georgia.

item.title: Biden backs Keisha Lance Bottoms for Georgia governor in his first endorsement since leaving office

item.dc:creator: Jonathan Allen
item.description: Sen. Elizabeth Warren, D-Mass., plans to campaign for Iowa Senate candidate Zach Wahls this month, adding firepower to a raging battle between progressive outsider candidates and the Democratic Party establishment

media:content.media:text: Sen. Elizabeth Warren, D-Mass.; Iowa Senate candidate Zach Wahls
media:content.media:description: Sen. Elizabeth Warren, D-Mass., and Iowa state Sen. Zach Walls.

item.title: Elizabeth Warren to campaign in Iowa for progressive Senate candidate

item.dc:creator: Rob Wile
item.description: Donald Trump says Spirit Airlines was given a final bailout proposal amid reports the carrier plans to shut down.

media:content.media:text: A yellow Spirit Airlines plane flies in the sky above trees
media:content.media:description: Spirit Airlines says it is operating as usual, despite multiple reports on May 1, 2026 that the budget carrier is preparing to shut down.

item.title: Trump says Spirit given 'final proposal' on bailout amid reports it may shut down

item.dc:creator: Mirna Alsharif
Minyvonne Burke
item.description: Human remains found Sunday during the search for a missing University of South Florida doctoral student were confirmed as belonging to Nahida Bristy, the Hillsborough County Sheriff’s Office said Friday.

media:content.media:credit: University of South Florida Police Dept.
media:content.media:description: Nahida Bristy.

media:content.media:credit: University of South Florida Police Dept.
media:content.media:description: Zamil Limon.

media:content.media:text: Police at the site where divers were searching for University of South Florida doctoral student Nahida Bristy in St. Petersburg, Fla., on April 26, 2026.
media:content.media:description: Police at the site where divers searched Sunday for Nahida Bristy in St. Petersburg, Fla.

item.title: Remains of missing University of South Florida student confirmed through DNA

item.dc:creator: Pilar Melendez
item.description: Florida congressional candidate Mark Davis sells “8647” T-shirts and hats on his campaign website — the same numerical shorthand to express discontent over President Donald Trump that is central to the case against a former FBI director.

media:content.media:text: Several 8647 items for sale on the internet, including: a hat, pin, t-shirt and stickers.
media:content.media:description: Hundreds of 8647 products are for sale online on Amazon, Etsy and other retailers.
Hundreds of 8647 products are for sale online on Amazon, Etsy and other retailers.

item.title: 'Arrest us all,' says congressional candidate who sells and wears '8647' merch

item.description: House Speaker Mike Johnson tells Rya Nobles that it is not necessary for Congress to weigh in on the Trump administration’s military action in Iran because the United States is currently “not at war.” The 1973 War Powers Resolution says the president has to remove military forces from conflict within 60 days if Congress doesn't authorize a war before that deadline.

media:content.media:title: Speaker Johnson says the U.S. is 'not at war' in Iran
media:content.media:description: House Speaker Mike Johnson tells Rya Nobles that it is not necessary for Congress to weigh in on the Trump administration’s military action in Iran because the United States is currently “not at war.” The 1973 War Powers Resolution says the president has to remove military forces from conflict within 60 days if Congress doesn't authorize a war before that deadline.

item.title: Speaker Johnson says the U.S. is 'not at war' in Iran

media:content.media:description: Several injured in Tacoma high school stabbing

item.title: Several injured in Tacoma high school stabbing
